title: End of Evangelion Asuka and her death image
display_title: End of Evangelion Asuka and her death image
wikitext:
[]: End of Evangelion - Asuka and her death image             Quote Post by Natsuka_Chie » Wed Nov 18, 2009 4:06 pm Today I was watching EoE again, English dubbed version (I wanted to know why you guys always say bad things about it), when I saw a frame that made me pause the movie, and return to the scene. This scene is when Asuka is is EVA02, at the bottom of the lake. When she screams: "I DONT WANT TO DIE", this is the first image, if I'm not mistaken, that appears. I never paid much attention to those images, until today. Oh god, curiosity killed the cat, as they say. This is the image: I mean, is this what she sees when she thinks of her dead? Those worms walking on her face almost made me puke... What do you think? As a side-note: That EVA liking Unit2 looks like it wants more than just eating her.

[]: Re: End of Evangelion - Asuka and her death image             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Nov 18, 2009 4:21 pm Natsuka_Chie wrote: Today I was watching EoE again, English dubbed version (I wanted to know why you guys always say bad things about it)

[]: Re: End of Evangelion - Asuka and her death image             Quote Post by Natsuka_Chie » Wed Nov 18, 2009 4:30 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Natsuka_Chie wrote: Today I was watching EoE again, English dubbed version (I wanted to know why you guys always say bad things about it)

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Nov 18, 2009 4:59 pm yeah, that was Asuka seeing herself dead. i for one loved EOE though for the story, and the questions it left you to answer. thats the spirit of EVA. and yes, that dose look like more, wait, this is proof kaowru wasn't gay, he was bi, and a cannibal. well, mabey not a cannibal since he wasn't human, but you get the idea.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Nov 18, 2009 5:17 pm shinjidoggysasuka wrote: yes, that dose look like more, wait, this is proof kaowru wasn't gay, he was bi, and a cannibal. well, mabey not a cannibal since he wasn't human, but you get the idea.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Nov 18, 2009 5:24 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: shinjidoggysasuka wrote: yes, that dose look like more, wait, this is proof kaowru wasn't gay, he was bi, and a cannibal. well, mabey not a cannibal since he wasn't human, but you get the idea.

[]: Re: End of Evangelion - Asuka and her death image             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Nov 18, 2009 5:31 pm I always thought that Maggoty Asuka was quite obvious during that sequence -- I noticed it on first or second viewing. Natsuka_Chie wrote: That EVA liking Unit2 looks like it wants more than just eating her.

[]: Re: End of Evangelion - Asuka and her death image             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Nov 18, 2009 5:39 pm Mr. Tines wrote: I always thought that Maggoty Asuka was quite obvious during that sequence -- I noticed it on first or second viewing. Natsuka_Chie wrote: That EVA liking Unit2 looks like it wants more than just eating her.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Wed Nov 18, 2009 5:39 pm thats all.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Nov 18, 2009 5:42 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: thats all.

[]: Re: End of Evangelion - Asuka and her death image             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Wed Nov 18, 2009 7:59 pm shinjidoggysasuka wrote: oh, those harpies are soooo naughty, i hope they'll give me a turn.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Wed Nov 18, 2009 8:08 pm I can understand why people dislike the dub, but yeah (I tend to mostly watch things like this dubbed. Now if it was live action, i'll more than likely watch it subbed) one of these days, i'll watch it subbed, but when? I have no clue, since (hopefully) i'll be seeing Evangelion 1.01 today & yes...maggot ridden Asuka FTW

[]: Re: End of Evangelion - Asuka and her death image             Quote Post by esselfortium » Wed Nov 18, 2009 8:56 pm shinjidoggysasuka wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: I always thought that Maggoty Asuka was quite obvious during that sequence -- I noticed it on first or second viewing. Natsuka_Chie wrote: That EVA liking Unit2 looks like it wants more than just eating her.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Thu Nov 19, 2009 11:27 am " All you have to do is follow the worms... "

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Nov 19, 2009 11:48 am The frame of Asuka's dead body kept me up at night. It was the only movie that accomplished that since watching Koyaanisqatsi .

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Nov 19, 2009 12:04 pm Sharaz Destler wrote: " All you have to do is follow the worms... "

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Nov 19, 2009 2:49 pm I guess the image is just what flashed into her mind, she did not wish to die. The harpies, well I would assume wish to have their way with her but ripping her apart works as well.

[]: Re: End of Evangelion - Asuka and her death image             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Nov 19, 2009 5:00 pm esselfortium wrote: shinjidoggysasuka wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: I always thought that Maggoty Asuka was quite obvious during that sequence -- I noticed it on first or second viewing. Natsuka_Chie wrote: That EVA liking Unit2 looks like it wants more than just eating her.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Nov 19, 2009 5:07 pm Stop quoting ENTIRE posts!

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Nov 19, 2009 5:09 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Stop quoting ENTIRE posts!
